# Production robots — applies once example.com goes live.
# The preview host (plmks-storefront.on-forge.com) ships with its own
# X-Robots-Tag: noindex header set in nginx, so this file is ignored
# there. See deploy.env for the preview-host noindex config.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /ptnotes/

Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
